meta.title: ClawBuddy: Project Overview
meta.description: AI agent marketplace — specs, scores, and implementation status

props.title: ClawBuddy
props.subtitle: Premier marketplace for AI agents and vibe-coded software

props.content: Next.js 16.2 marketplace with Netflix-style gold/black UI. 67 routes, 185 pages, 16,500+ LOC, Supabase backend. 8 specs drafted (1,050 lines), all 7 features scored GO on the 10-point matrix. MVP sprint: Themes + Compare + Trailers.

props.title: Frontend
props.content: Next.js 16.2, React 19, Tailwind 4.2, shadcn/ui. Route groups with (main)/(auth)/(seller). Server actions + data access layer.

props.title: Backend
props.content: Supabase (Postgres + Auth + Storage + Realtime). Split client (browser/server/admin). Mock data fallback for development.

props.title: Design Tokens
props.content: #141414 background, #D4AF37 gold accent. 4vw margins, 400ms hover delay. Currently dark-only — Themes spec adds light mode + 3 named themes.

props.label: SPECS
props.title: All 7 Feature Specs
props.subtitle: Scored via 10-point go/no-go matrix (UV, TF, T2M, Dep, Rev, Diff, Plat, AI, Net, Mnt)

props.title: 1. Themes
props.content: next-themes + CSS custom properties. Light/dark toggle, system detection, Classic + Dawn themes. Foundation for all visual features. **600 LOC, 6 files modified.**

props.title: 2. Compare
props.content: Global compare tray (max 4), feature matrix, pricing normalization, AI diff summary. /compare stub already exists. **1,200 LOC, 2 new + 5 modified.**

props.title: 3. Trailers
props.content: Hover-preview on cards, full-screen with audio, multi-trailer carousel. FFmpeg thumbnails, drag-and-drop upload, Supabase Storage. **1,500 LOC, 4 new + 4 modified.**

props.title: AgentPing Integration (Score: 75)
props.content: 416-component library → StatusIndicator, CapabilityBadge, UptimeGraph on listings. 4-tier trust signals. 2 new Supabase tables. Highest-scoring feature.

props.title: Agent-First / Skill API (Score: 73)
props.content: REST API at /api/agents/ — self-register, update, expose skill manifests, read stats. API key auth, rate limiting, 4-tier verification (Unverified→Trusted).

props.label: PHASE 3
props.title: Seller Tooling
props.subtitle: Reduce listing creation from 30 min to 2 min

props.title: Workshop/Intake (Score: 63)
props.content: Paste a GitHub URL → auto-populate listing. Lev intake pipeline extracts name, capabilities, tags, version with confidence scores. Preview card + manual override.

props.title: /now Pages + Gemini Avatar (Score: 66)
props.content: Auto-generated per-agent status pages via lev-now renderer. Google Gemini API generates unique AI avatars. Public badge SVG endpoint for README embeds.

67 routes, 185 pages, 16,500+ LOC. Netflix-style gold/black UI. Full Supabase backend with auth, storage, realtime. Next.js 16.2 + React 19 + Tailwind 4.2 + shadcn/ui. Currently dark-only with hardcoded tokens — Themes spec is the foundation everything else builds on.
